prestazioni: 10A/0810 Wankel rotary engine: Full porting and polishing of the rotor housings and side plates by Mazdaspeed Racing, increasing intake/exhaust flow efficiency by 22% via custom 3-angle valve seats and oversized peripheral ports (42mm intake, 38mm exhaust).

Forced induction via custom-built Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) with a Mazdaspeed billet aluminum compressor wheel, mated to a custom air-to-water intercooler (Setrab 4000 series core) and a Tial 38mm external wastegate (4-bar actuator).

Fuel system upgrade: Dual Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pumps feeding a set of ID1000X injectors (1000cc/min), controlled by a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with custom rotary-specific ignition mapping (12° base timing, 28° total advance at 8,500 RPM) and a Mazdaspeed 4-2-1 stainless steel header with 4-1 collector.
estetica: Full carbon fiber body restoration using dry carbon weave (Toray T700) for the hood, fenders, and trunk lid, reducing weight by 18kg while retaining the original Cosmo Sport 110S silhouette (no flares or aggressive overhangs).

Custom 3-piece 15x8.5-inch magnesium alloy wheels (SSR Type C II) with a 4x150mm bolt pattern, wrapped in Yokohama Advan A052 semi-slick tires (225/50R15 front, 245/45R15 rear) for period-correct grip and aesthetics.

Interior retrim with bespoke Recaro SRD-E seats (original Cosmo Sport 110S pattern) upholstered in Alcantara (Momo Red) with red stitching, paired with a Nardi Classic 380mm steering wheel (wood rim) and a custom roll cage (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly) painted Mazda Racing Silver (MZ-10).
